items.name: FishHook
items.description: Automated cross-platform arbitrage bot for Polymarket and Kalshi prediction markets. Detects and executes fee-aware arbitrage opportunities via instant fill and resting order strategies, with cash management, position caps, event-aware trading halts, and full CSV audit logging.
